meta.title: Ikigai Team — Your AI Dream Team
meta.description: 6 AI agents with built-in GTD, OKRs, Level 10 Life, and S3 governance. A complete system for solo founders — not just agents, a way of working.

personal.title: Your AI
personal.subtitle: Open your preferred AI tool, paste one prompt, and start. No setup wizard, no docs detour, no extra decisions.

work.title: Your AI-Powered
work.subtitle: One prompt sets up a ready-to-work environment with company context, team workflows, and role presets already in place.

hero.heroAlt: Meet the Ikigai Team — Maya, Viktor, Luna, Alex, Marco, Sage, and Kai

lbd.title: Built at Learn By Doing Academy
lbd.description: Want to build your own AI agent team? Live sessions, mentorship, and real projects.

personal.title: Not Just Agents. A Journey.
personal.subtitle: It starts with you — not with configuration files. Every methodology is built in. You do not have to learn it first. The team teaches you as you go.

work.title: Not Just Tools. A System.
work.subtitle: It starts with your company context — not blank templates. Workflows, defaults, and governance are preloaded. Your team is productive from day one.

reflect.name: Reflect
reflect.description: Start with yourself. Level 10 Life assessment — score 10 areas of your life honestly. Where are you right now?

findDirection.name: Find Direction
findDirection.description: Define your mission and vision. Use the GROW framework: Goal (mission), Reality (L10L scores), Options, Way Forward.

setStrategy.name: Set Strategy
setStrategy.description: Turn your Way Forward into OKRs. Measurable objectives for this quarter. Challenge assumptions. Focus.

buildRhythm.name: Build the Rhythm
buildRhythm.description: Daily reviews, inbox processing, weekly planning. The GTD system that turns strategy into daily action.

execute.name: Execute
execute.description: Viktor builds. Luna creates content. Kai handles community. Sage checks in. Maya keeps it all running. You focus on your ikigai.

install.name: Install
install.description: One prompt sets up your company workspace with shared context, governance rules, and team defaults.

configure.name: Configure Roles
configure.description: Define roles, domains, and decision authority. Each team member gets a personalized workspace with their responsibilities.

onboard.name: Onboard the Team
onboard.description: Team members paste one prompt and land in a ready-to-work environment. Role, projects, and tools are pre-configured.

workflows.name: Activate Workflows
workflows.description: Meetings, standups, follow-ups, and reporting run automatically. The system captures context across sessions.

scale.name: Scale
scale.description: Add new team members, roles, or projects. The foundation grows with your organization. Consistent workflows, individual workspaces.

methodologies.title: Everything Built In
methodologies.subtitle: You do not have to learn these methodologies first. The team teaches you as you go.

ikigai.name: Ikigai
ikigai.description: Find your purpose. Delegate everything else. The team exists so you can focus on what only you can do.

level10life.name: Level 10 Life
level10life.description: Score 10 life areas, track trends over time, catch burnout before it hits. Sage runs assessments regularly.

grow.name: GROW
grow.description: Goal, Reality, Options, Way Forward. The coaching framework that turns reflection into action.

okrs.name: OKRs
okrs.description: Quarterly objectives cascade to every agent. Marco tracks progress and challenges anything that does not move the needle.

gtd.name: GTD
gtd.description: Inbox processing, next actions, weekly reviews. Maya runs Getting Things Done so nothing slips through.

s3.name: Sociocracy 3.0
s3.description: Clear domains, consent-based decisions, decision authority matrix. Every agent knows their boundaries.

crm.name: CRM
crm.description: Meet someone, send a screenshot. Kai researches them, enriches the profile, and tracks follow-ups.

scrum.name: Scrum
scrum.description: Daily standups, sprint planning, retrospectives. Maya reports what each agent accomplished and flags blockers.

onboarding.name: Onboarding
onboarding.description: One prompt, ready workspace. New team members are productive from day one with role, projects, and tools pre-configured.

roles.name: Role Management
roles.description: Clear role definitions, domain boundaries, and decision authority. Every person knows their responsibilities.

knowledge.name: Knowledge Base
knowledge.description: Company context, meeting notes, and decisions are captured and shared. No more lost context between sessions.

agents.title: Meet Your Team
agents.subtitle: Six specialized agents, each with their own expertise and personality. Pick the ones you need.

maya.description: Maya keeps everything running. She owns your daily rhythm, manages your inbox, coordinates between agents, and ensures nothing falls through the cracks.

viktor.description: Viktor handles the technical side. He architects solutions, writes code, manages deployments, and keeps your tech stack healthy and your codebase clean.

luna.description: Luna turns your ideas into content that reaches people. She writes blog posts, manages social media, optimizes for SEO, and builds your public presence.
responsibilities: Blog posts, newsletters, and social media

marco.description: Marco ensures you are building the right things. He defines OKRs, evaluates business models, tracks metrics, and keeps your portfolio focused on what matters.

sage.description: Sage watches out for you as a human. She tracks your energy, flags burnout risk, helps you reconnect with purpose, and maintains the balance between ambition and wellbeing.

kai.description: Kai builds your network and nurtures your community. He manages contacts, follows up after events, runs community engagement, and opens doors to partnerships.

personal.title: How It Works
personal.subtitle: Three steps to your AI-powered executive team.

startWithSage.title: Start With Sage
startWithSage.description: A coaching session, not a setup wizard. Reflect on your life, score where you are, find your direction.

buildStrategy.title: Build Your Strategy
buildStrategy.description: Marco helps turn your vision into OKRs. Maya sets up the daily rhythm. The team forms around your goals.

focusOnIkigai.title: Focus on Your Ikigai
focusOnIkigai.description: The team handles operations, code, content, community. You do what only you can do.

work.title: How It Works
work.subtitle: Three steps to a productive AI workspace for your team.

startWithSage.title: Install the Workspace
startWithSage.description: One prompt sets up company context, role defaults, and shared workflows. No manual configuration needed.

buildStrategy.title: Onboard Your Team
buildStrategy.description: Each team member gets a personalized workspace with their role, projects, and tools pre-configured.

focusOnIkigai.title: Focus on the Work
focusOnIkigai.description: Meetings, follow-ups, research, and reporting happen automatically. Your team focuses on what matters.

personal.title: Sound Familiar?
personal.p1: You are a solo founder wearing all the hats. CEO on Monday, developer on Tuesday, content writer on Wednesday, support on Thursday, and by Friday you are too exhausted to think about strategy.
personal.p2: You have heard of OKRs, GTD, Level 10 Life, Sociocracy. You know they work. But who has time to learn all that, set it up, and actually stick with it?
personal.p3: What if someone sat down with you, helped you figure out what matters, turned it into a plan, and then handled the execution? Not a course to watch. Not a template to fill out. A team that meets you where you are and teaches you as you go.
personal.p4: That is Ikigai Team. It starts with a conversation, not a configuration. Sage helps you find your direction. Marco turns it into strategy. Maya makes it happen every day. You focus on your ikigai — the thing only you can do.

work.title: Sounds Like Your Company?
work.p1: Your team uses five different AI tools with zero consistency. Everyone prompts differently. Context is lost between sessions. New hires spend days figuring out the setup.
work.p2: You know AI can transform productivity. But rolling it out across a team means standards, governance, shared context, and onboarding — and nobody has time to build all that.
work.p3: What if one prompt gave every team member a workspace with company context, role defaults, meeting workflows, and shared governance already in place? Not a training program. Not a wiki page. A system that works from day one.
work.p4: That is Ikigai Team for work. Install once, onboard everyone. Shared foundation, consistent workflows, individual workspaces. Your team focuses on the work — not the tooling.

personal.title: Ready to Meet Your Team?
personal.subtitle: One command sets up 6 agents with GTD, OKRs, coaching, and governance. You walk away with a working system, not a blank canvas.

work.title: Ready to Set Up Your Workspace?
work.subtitle: One command installs a complete AI workspace with company context, team workflows, and governance. Every team member is productive from day one.
